import Mathlib

/-!### List.flatten -/

theorem length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length (L : List (List α)) :
    L.flatten.length ∈ (L.map length).partialSums := by
  induction L with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons]
    right
    simpa using ih

theorem getElem_flatten_aux₁ (L : List (List α)) (i : Nat) (h : i < L.flatten.length) :
    (L.map length).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) - 1 < L.length := by
  have := findIdx_lt_length_of_exists (xs := (L.map length).partialSums) (p := fun x => decide (x > i))
  specialize this ⟨L.flatten.length,
    length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, by grind⟩
  simp at this
  simp
  have : 0 < findIdx (fun x => decide (i < x)) (map length L).partialSums := by
    by_contra w
    simp at w
  omega

theorem getElem_flatten_aux₂ (L : List (List α)) (i : Nat) (h : i < L.flatten.length) :
    let j := (L.map length).partialSums.findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) - 1
    have hj : j < L.length := getElem_flatten_aux₁ L i h
    let k := i - (L.take j).flatten.length
    k < L[j].length := by

import Mathlib

/-! List operations -/
noncomputable def length (l : List α) : Nat := l.length
noncomputable def head (l : List α) (h : l ≠ []) : α := l.head h
noncomputable def getLast (l : List α) (h : l ≠ []) : α := l.getLast h
noncomputable def getElem (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : α := l.getElem i h
noncomputable def getElem? (l : List α) (i : Nat) : Option α := l.getElem? i
noncomputable def take (l : List α) (i : Nat) : List α := l.take i
noncomputable def reverse (l : List α) : List α := l.reverse
noncomputable def map (f : α → β) (l : List α) : List β := l.map f
noncomputable def foldl (f : α → β → α) (b : α) (l : List β) : α := l.foldl f b
noncomputable def foldr (f : α → β → β) (b : β) (l : List α) : β := l.foldr f b
noncomputable def partialSums (l : List α) : List α := l.partialSums
noncomputable def partialProds (l : List α) : List α := l.partialProds
noncomputable def flatten (l : List (List α)) : List α := l.flatten

/-! Theorems about List operations -/
@[simp]
theorem length_nil : length [] = 0 := rfl
@[simp]
theorem length_cons : length (a :: l) = 1 + length l := rfl
@[simp]
theorem head_nil {a} : head [] (by simp) = a := rfl
@[simp]
theorem head_cons : head (a :: l) _ = a := rfl
@[simp]
theorem getLast_nil {a} : getLast [] (by simp) = a := rfl
@[simp]
theorem getLast_cons : getLast (a :: l) _ = l.getLast (by simp) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem getElem_nil {a i} (h : i < 0) : getElem [] i h = a := rfl
@[simp]
theorem getElem_cons : getElem (a :: l) i (by simp) = if i = 0 then a else getElem l (i - 1) (by omega) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem getElem?_nil : getElem? [] i = none := rfl
@[simp]
theorem getElem?_cons : getElem? (a :: l) i = some a if i = 0 else getElem? l (i - 1) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem take_nil : take [] i = [] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem take_cons : take (a :: l) i = if i = 0 then [a] else a :: take l (i - 1) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem reverse_nil : reverse [] = [] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem reverse_cons : reverse (a :: l) = reverse l ++ [a] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem map_nil : map f [] = [] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem map_cons : map f (a :: l) = f a :: map f l := rfl
@[simp]
theorem foldl_nil : foldl f b [] = b := rfl
@[simp]
theorem foldl_cons : foldl f b (a :: l) = f (foldl f b l) a := rfl
@[simp]
theorem foldr_nil : foldr f b [] = b := rfl
@[simp]
theorem foldr_cons : foldr f b (a :: l) = f a (foldr f b l) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem partialSums_nil : partialSums [] = [0] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem partialSums_cons : partialSums (a :: l) = 0 :: l.partialSums.map (a + ·) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem partialProds_nil : partialProds [] = [1] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem partialProds_cons : partialProds (a :: l) = 1 :: l.partialProds.map (a * ·) := rfl
@[simp]
theorem flatten_nil : flatten [] = [] := rfl
@[simp]
theorem flatten_cons : flatten (l₁ :: l₂) = l₁ ++ l₂.flatten := rfl

/-! Theorems about List properties -/
theorem length_append : length (l₁ ++ l₂) = length l₁ + length l₂ := rfl
theorem length_reverse : length (l.reverse) = length l := rfl
theorem length_map : length (l.map f) = length l := rfl
theorem length_foldl : length (l.foldl f b) = length l + 1 := rfl
theorem length_foldr : length (l.foldr f b) = length l + 1 := rfl
theorem length_partialSums : length (l.partialSums) = length l + 1 := rfl
theorem length_partialProds : length (l.partialProds) = length l + 1 := rfl
theorem length_flatten : length (l.flatten) = (l.map length).sum := rfl

/-! Theorems about List access -/
theorem head_reverse {l} : (l.reverse).head (by simp) = l.getLast (by simp) := by
  simp [reverse_cons, head_cons, getLast_cons]
theorem head_foldr {f b l} (h : l ≠ []) : (l.foldr f b).head h = f (l.head h) b := by
  simp [foldr, head_cons, head_nil]
theorem head_foldl {f b l} (h : l ≠ []) : (l.foldl f b).head h = f b (l.head h) := by
  simp [foldl, head_cons, head_nil]
theorem head_partialSums {l} : (l.partialSums).head (by simp) = l.length := by
  simp [partialSums, head_cons]
theorem head_partialProds {l} : (l.partialProds).head (by simp) = l.length := by
  simp [partialProds, head_cons]
theorem head_flatten {l} : (l.flatten).head (by simp) = l.head (by simp) := by
  simp [flatten_cons, head_cons, head_nil]

theorem getLast_reverse {f b l} : (l.reverse).getLast (by simp) = l.head (by simp) := by
  simp [reverse_cons, getLast_cons, head_cons, head_nil]
theorem getLast_foldr {f b l} (h : l ≠ []) : (l.foldr f b).getLast h = f (l.getLast h) b := by
  simp [foldr, getLast_cons, getLast_nil]
theorem getLast_foldl {f b l} (h : l ≠ []) : (l.foldl f b).getLast h = f b (l.getLast h) := by
  simp [foldl, getLast_cons, getLast_nil]
theorem getLast_partialSums {f b l} : (l.partialSums).getLast (by simp) = l.sum := by
  simp [partialSums, getLast_cons, foldl, sum_cons]
theorem getLast_partialProds {f b l} : (l.partialProds).getLast (by simp) = l.prod := by
  simp [partialProds, getLast_cons, foldr, prod_cons]
theorem getLast_flatten {f b l} : (l.flatten).getLast (by simp) = l.prod := by
  simp [flatten_cons, getLast_cons, getLast_nil]

theorem getElem_reverse {f b l i} (h : i < (l.reverse).length) : (l.reverse)[i] = l.getElem (length l - 1 - i) (by omega) := by
  simp [reverse_cons, getElem_cons, getElem_nil, length_cons]
  induction l generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons x xs ih =>
    cases i with
    | zero => simp [getElem_cons]
    | succ i =>
      simp [ih, getElem_cons]
      all_goals omega
theorem getElem_foldr {f b l i} (h : i < (l.foldr f b).length) : (l.foldr f b)[i] = foldr f b (l.drop i) := by
  induction l generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons x xs ih => cases i <;> simp [ih] at h ⊢
theorem getElem_foldl {f b l i} (h : i < (l.foldl f b).length) : (l.foldl f b)[i] = foldl f b (l.drop i) := by
  induction l generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons x xs ih => cases i <;> simp [ih] at h ⊢
theorem getElem_partialSums {f b l i} (h : i < (l.partialSums).length) : (l.partialSums)[i] = (l.take i).sum := by
  simp [partialSums, getElem_cons, sum_cons]
theorem getElem_partialProds {f b l i} (h : i < (l.partialProds).length) : (l.partialProds)[i] = (l.take i).prod := by
  simp [partialProds, getElem_cons, prod_cons]
theorem getElem_flatten {f b l i} (h : i < (l.flatten).length) : (l.flatten)[i] = l.getElem (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length l).partialSums - 1) (by
    have h1 : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length l).partialSums ≤ (map length l).partialSums.length := by

    have h2 : (map length l).partialSums.length = l.length + 1 := rfl

import Mathlib

/-! List.foldr -/

@[simp]
theorem foldr_nil {f : α → β → β} (b : β) : foldr f b [] = b := by
  simp

@[simp]
theorem foldr_ne_nil {f : α → β → β} (l : List α) : foldr f b l ≠ [] := by
  simp [foldr]

@[simp, grind =]
theorem foldr_cons {f : α → β → β} :
    foldr f b (a :: l) = f a (foldr f b l) := by
  simp only [foldr, cons.injEq, and_true]
  induction l generalizing a with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons _ _ ih => simp only [ih]

theorem foldr_singleton {f : α → β → β} : foldr f b [a] = f a b := by
  simp

@[simp]
theorem foldr_iff_nil {f : α → β → β} (c : β) : foldr f b l = [c] ↔ c = b ∧ l = [] := by
  constructor <;> cases l <;> simp_all

@[simp, grind =]
theorem length_foldr {f : α → β → β} (b : β) (l : List α) :
    length (foldr f b l) = l.length + 1 := by induction l <;> simp_all

theorem foldr_append {f : α → β → β} (l₁ l₂ : List α) :
    foldr f b (l₁ ++ l₂) = foldr f (foldr f b l₂) l₁ := by
  induction l₁ <;> simp [*]

@[simp]
theorem head_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : foldr f b l ≠ []) :
    (foldr f b l).head h = foldr f b l := by
  simp

theorem getLast_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : foldr f b l ≠ []) :
    (foldr f b l).getLast h = b := by
  induction l
  case nil => simp
  case cons head tail ih => simp [getLast_cons, foldr, ih]

theorem getLast?_foldr {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l).getLast? = some b := by
  simp [getLast?]
  split
  · exact absurd ‹_› foldr_ne_nil
  · simp [←‹_›, getLast_foldr]

theorem tail_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : 0 < l.length) :
    (foldr f b l).tail = foldr f b l.tail := by
  induction l <;> simp_all

@[grind _=_]
theorem drop_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : i ≤ l.length) :
    (foldr f b l).drop i = foldr f b (l.drop i) := by
  induction i generalizing l with
  | zero => simp
  | succ => cases l <;> simp_all

@[simp, grind =]
theorem getElem_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : i < (foldr f b l).length) :
    (foldr f b l)[i] = foldr f b (l.take i) := by
  induction l generalizing i with
  | zero => simp
  | succ _ ih => cases i <;> simp [ih] at h ⊢

@[grind =]
theorem getElem?_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : i < l.length + 1) :
    (foldr f b l)[i]? = if i < l.length + 1 then some (foldr f b (l.take i)) else none := by
  split <;> simp [h]

@[simp, grind =]
theorem getElem_foldr_zero {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l)[0] = foldr f b l := by
  simp

@[simp, grind =]
theorem getElem?_foldr_zero {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l)[0]? = some (foldr f b l) := by
  simp

theorem getElem?_foldr_of_lt {f : α → β → β} (h : i < l.length + 1) :
    (foldr f b l)[i]? = some (foldr f b (l.take i)) := by
  simp [h]

theorem foldr_map {f : α → β → β} {g : γ → α} (b : β) (l : List γ) :
    foldr f b (l.map g) = foldr (fun x acc => f (g x) acc) b l := by
  suffices ∀ l, foldr f b (l.map g) = foldr (fun x acc => f (g x) acc) b l from by
    induction l generalizing b <;> simp [*]
  intro l
  induction l <;> simp [*]

import Mathlib

/-! flatten -/

theorem length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length (L : List (List α)) :
    L.flatten.length ∈ (L.map length).partialSums := by
  induction L with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons]
    right
    simpa using ih

theorem getElem_flatten_aux₁ (L : List (List α)) (i : Nat) (h : i < L.flatten.length) :
    (L.map length).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) - 1 < L.length := by
  have := findIdx_lt_length_of_exists (xs := (L.map length).partialSums) (p := fun x => decide (x > i))
  specialize this ⟨L.flatten.length,
    length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, by grind⟩
  simp at this
  simp
  have : 0 < findIdx (fun x => decide (i < x)) (map length L).partialSums := by
    by_contra w
    simp at w
  omega

theorem getElem_flatten_aux₂ (L : List (List α)) (i : Nat) (h : i < L.flatten.length) :
    let j := (L.map length).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) - 1
    have hj : j < L.length := getElem_flatten_aux₁ L i h
    let k := i - (L.take j).flatten.length
    k < L[j].length := by

import Mathlib

/-! List.foldr -/

@[simp]
theorem foldr_nil {f : α → β → β} (b : β) : foldr f b [] = b := by
  simp

@[simp]
theorem foldr_ne_nil {f : α → β → β} : foldr f b l ≠ [] := by
  simp [foldr]

@[simp, grind =]
theorem foldr_cons {f : α → β → β} :
    foldr f b (a :: l) = foldr f (f a b) l := by
  simp only [foldr, cons.injEq, and_true]
  induction l generalizing a with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons _ _ ih => simp only [foldr, ih]

theorem foldr_singleton {f : α → β → β} : foldr f b [a] = f a b := by
  simp

@[simp]
theorem foldr_iff_nil {f : α → β → β} (c : β) : foldr f b l = [c] ↔ c = b ∧ l = [] := by
  constructor <;> cases l <;> simp_all

@[simp, grind =]
theorem length_foldr {f : α → β → β} (b : β) (l : List α) :
    length (foldr f b l) = l.length + 1 := by
  induction l <;> simp_all

theorem foldr_append {f : α → β → β} (l₁ l₂ : List α) :
    foldr f b (l₁ ++ l₂) = foldr f (foldr f b l₂) l₁ := by
  induction l₁ <;> simp [*]

@[simp, grind =]
theorem getElem_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : i < (foldr f b l).length) :
    (foldr f b l)[i] = foldr f b (l.drop i) := by
  induction l generalizing i with
  | zero => simp
  | succ _ ih => cases i <;> simp [ih] at h ⊢

@[simp, grind =]
theorem getElem?_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : i < l.length + 1) :
    (foldr f b l)[i]? = if i < l.length + 1 then some (foldr f b (l.drop i)) else none := by
  split <;> simp [h]

theorem getElem_foldr_zero {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l)[0] = foldr f b l := by
  simp

theorem getElem?_foldr_zero {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l)[0]? = some (foldr f b l) := by
  simp

@[simp]
theorem head_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : foldr f b l ≠ []) :
    (foldr f b l).head h = foldr f b l := by
  simp [head]

theorem getLast_foldr {f : α → β → β} (h : foldr f b l ≠ []) :
    (foldr f b l).getLast h = b := by
  induction l
  case nil => simp
  case cons head tail ih => simp [getLast_cons, foldr_ne_nil, ih]

theorem getLast?_foldr {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l).getLast? = some b := by
  simp [getLast?]
  split
  · exact absurd ‹_› foldr_ne_nil
  · simp [←‹_›, getLast_foldr]

theorem getElem?_succ_foldr {f : α → β → β} : (foldr f b l)[i + 1]? =
    (foldr f b l)[i]?.bind fun x => l[i]?.map fun y => f x y := by
  induction l generalizing i with
  | zero => simp
  | succ _ ih => cases i <;> simp [ih]

theorem foldr_map {f : α → β → β} {g : γ → α} (b : β) (l : List γ) :
    foldr f b (l.map g) = foldr (fun x acc => f (g x) acc) b l := by
  suffices ∀ l, foldr f b (l.map g) = foldr (fun x acc => f (g x) acc) b l from by
    induction l generalizing b <;> simp [*]
  intro l
  induction l <;> simp [*]

import Mathlib
open List

/-!
List functions
-/

-- foldl/foldr
@[simp]
theorem foldl_nil {f : β → α → β} (b : β) : foldl f b [] = b := by simp
@[simp]
theorem foldl_cons {f : β → α → β} (a : α) (l : List α) : foldl f a (x :: l) = f (foldl f a l) x := by
  simp [foldl]

@[simp]
theorem foldr_nil {f : α → β → β} (b : β) : foldr f b [] = b := by simp
@[simp]
theorem foldr_cons {f : α → β → β} (a : α) (l : List α) : foldr f a (x :: l) = f x (foldr f b l) := by
  simp [foldr]

-- List.fold
@[simp]
theorem fold_nil {f : β → α → β} (b : β) : fold f b [] = b := by simp
@[simp]
theorem fold_cons {f : β → α → β} (a : α) (l : List α) : fold f a (x :: l) = f (fold f a l) x := by
  simp [fold]

-- List.scanl
@[simp, grind =]
theorem scanl_nil {f : β → α → β} (b : β) : scanl f b [] = [b] := by
  simp [scanl]
  <;> rfl

@[simp, grind =]
theorem scanl_cons {f : β → α → β} (a : α) (l : List α) :
    (f a (l.head)) :: (scanl f (f a (l.head)) l.tail) := by
  simp [scanl]

@[simp]
theorem scanl_ne_nil {f : β → α → β} : ∃ l, (f a (l.head)) :: (scanl f (f a (l.head)) l.tail) ≠ [] := by
  simp [ne_nil_iff_length_pos, length_cons]

@[simp, grind =]
theorem length_scanl {f : β → α → β} (b : β) (l : List α) :
    length (scanl f b l) = l.length + 1 := by
  induction l <;> simp_all

@[simp, grind =]
theorem head_scanl {f : β → α → β} (h : (f a (l.head)) :: (scanl f (f a (l.head)) l.tail) ≠ []) :
    (f a (l.head)) :: (scanl f (f a (l.head)) l.tail).head h = f a (l.head) := by
  simp

@[simp, grind =]
theorem head?_scanl {f : β → α → β} : ((f a (l.head)) :: (scanl f (f a (l.head)) l.tail)).head? = some (f a (l.head)) := by

@[simp, grind =]
theorem length_flatten (L : List (List α)) : L.flatten.length = L.sum (fun l => l.length) + 1 := by
  induction L with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih => simp_all [sum_cons]

@[simp]
theorem length_flatten (L : List (List α)) : L.flatten.length = L.sum (fun l => l.length) + 1 := by
  induction L with

theorem length_flatten (L : List (List α)) : L.flatten.length = L.sum (fun l => l.length) + 1 := by
  induction L with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih => simp_all [sum_cons]
